title: Thai Chicken Noodle Stir-Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired stir-fry made with protein-rich chicken, fragrant noodles, and crunchy fried shallots.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove chicken from the wok and set aside.
Add curry paste to the wok and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add noodles, fish sauce, and sugar to the wok, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Return chicken to the wok and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until noodles are well coated.
Stir in fried shallots and cilantro.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
